products.name: Ninja Crispi Pro 6-in-1 Glass Air Fryer
products.description: Cook, reheat, bake and dehydrate with this 6-in-1 glass air fryer. Nontoxic glass containers are microwave, freezer and dishwasher safe for effortless prep and cleanup.

products.name: 8 Blade All-in-1 Vegetable Chopper
products.description: Chop, slice and dice vegetables in seconds with 8 interchangeable stainless steel blades. Includes a catch container for mess-free prep — perfect for salads, soups and meal prep.

products.name: Kitchen Mama Auto Electric Can Opener
products.description: Open cans hands-free with a simple button press. Smooth edge design and automatic operation make it ideal for anyone wanting effortless, safe kitchen prep every day.

products.name: Silonn Nugget Ice Maker Countertop
products.description: Makes 33lbs of chewable pellet ice per day right on your countertop. Self-cleaning function and compact design make it perfect for home kitchens and small offices.

products.name: Cosori TurboBlaze 9-in-1 Air Fryer 6Qt
products.description: 9 cooking modes in one appliance — air fry, roast, bake, broil, dehydrate and more. Premium ceramic coating means healthier cooking and incredibly easy cleanup every time.

products.name: Zulay Rechargeable Milk Frother Handheld
products.description: Rechargeable handheld frother with 4 whisks and a powerful 2-speed motor. Makes perfect lattes, cappuccinos, matcha and protein shakes in seconds — no plug needed.

products.name: TempPro TP19H Digital Meat Thermometer
products.description: Instant-read thermometer with motion-sensing backlit display. Waterproof design makes it perfect for BBQ, grilling, candy making and everyday cooking with precise results.

products.name: Ninja Professional Blender 1000W 72oz
products.description: 1000W total crushing technology blends smoothies, crushes ice and handles frozen fruit effortlessly. The large 72oz pitcher handles family-sized batches with ease.

products.name: Potane Precision Vacuum Sealer Machine
products.description: 8 smart presets for dry, moist, soft and delicate foods. Keeps food fresh up to 5x longer — ideal for bulk buying, meal prep and reducing food waste at home.

products.name: Aunmaon Touchless Automatic Soap Dispenser
products.description: Hands-free soap dispensing with adjustable volume control and long battery life. Works with thick or thin soap — great for kitchens, bathrooms and easy for young children.

products.name: Borlebbi Electric Meat Slicer 200W
products.description: Two removable stainless steel blades with adjustable thickness settings. Slice meat, cheese and bread to your preferred thickness — built-in child lock for added safety.

products.name: Noalto Reusable K Cups 2-Pack
products.description: Universal stainless steel pods compatible with Keurig 1.0 and 2.0 machines. Use your own ground coffee and save money on every single brew — eco-friendly and easy to clean.

products.name: 2 Slice Easy Touch Screen Toaster
products.description: Stainless steel toaster with wide slots, even toasting for bagels & bread, reheat & defrost, removable crumb tray.

products.name: Govee Smart Recessed Lighting 6 Inch 4-Pack
products.description: Transform any room with Wi-Fi & Bluetooth RGBWW smart downlights. 65 scene modes, voice control via Alexa and Google Assistant, and a simple app make lighting customisation effortless.

products.name: Shark FlexStyle Air Styling & Drying System
products.description: All-in-one hair dryer and multi-styler with auto-wrap curlers, paddle brush and oval brush. Dry and style simultaneously for salon-quality results at home in less time.

products.name: Hatch Baby Sound Machine & Smart Night Light
products.description: Wi-Fi connected sound machine, night light and alarm clock in one. Build sleep routines, play white noise and nursery stories — adjustable brightness and volume from your phone.

products.name: Roborock S8 MaxV Ultra Robot Vacuum & Mop
products.description: 10,000Pa suction with AI obstacle avoidance, auto mop washing and drying, and a self-refill drainage system. Set it and forget it — comes home spotless every time.

products.name: Birdkiss Smart Bird Feeder with AI Camera
products.description: Solar-powered bird feeder with AI camera that auto-captures bird visits and sends instant notifications. Identify species, watch live footage and enjoy wildlife from anywhere.

products.name: Ring Battery Doorbell (Newest Model)
products.description: Head-to-toe video coverage with live view, two-way talk and motion alerts. Easy wireless installation and no wiring required — see and speak to visitors from your phone anywhere.

products.name: Aiobuvr Rechargeable Ring Camera Battery 6040mAh
products.description: 6040mAh replacement battery with LED charge display. Compatible with Ring 2/3/3 Plus/4, Spotlight Cam, Stick Up Cam and Peephole Cam — charge multiple batteries at once.

products.name: KitchenClouds Anti Fatigue Kitchen Mat 17.3"x28"
products.description: Cushioned anti-fatigue mat that makes standing at the sink or counter genuinely comfortable. Water resistant, easy to wipe clean, and stays put — great for long cooking sessions.

products.name: Apple Watch Series 11 GPS 46mm Smartwatch
products.description: The #1 Best Seller in Smartwatches. Features Sleep Score, ECG, fitness tracking, always-on display, and seamless iPhone integration. Charges in under 30 minutes — ideal for health-focused users.

products.name: ecobee Smart Sensor 2 Pack
products.description: Monitor temperature and occupancy in every room for real comfort and energy savings. Compatible with all ecobee thermostats — easy setup and works across long distances.

products.name: WYZE Cam Pan v3 Indoor/Outdoor Security Camera
products.description: IP65-rated 1080p pan/tilt/zoom camera with color night vision and 2-way audio. Works indoors and outdoors, compatible with Alexa & Google Assistant.

products.name: DJI Osmo Mobile 7P Gimbal Stabilizer
products.description: 3-axis gimbal stabilizer with native tracking in any camera app, built-in extension rod, tripod, and phone charging. Up to 10 hours of use — perfect for smooth YouTube and social content.

products.name: Liene M100 4x6" Portable Photo Printer
products.description: Print vibrant 4x6" photos in under 30 seconds from your iPhone or Android via Wi-Fi. Includes 100 sheets and 3 cartridges — thermal dye sublimation for true full-color prints.
